description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.1 Docker image (with node:16 installed) to build a Jekyll site configured as shown. Define two stages: build and deploy, and cache the .bundle directory and node_modules folder between runs. In the build stage add a build_site job that runs `bundle install --path .bundle`, `npm ci`, then `JEKYLL_ENV=production jekyll build -d public`, and stores the resulting public/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that simply publishes the public artifact to GitLab Pages and is limited to the main branch via `only: ["main"]`.
